# Huamei — Premium Custom Luxury Packaging
> Custom rigid boxes, magnetic closures, hot-foil stamping, embossing.
> Four factories across Henan, Zhejiang, Sichuan, Guizhou. Founded 1992.

## Capabilities
- [Rigid boxes](https://huamei.io/craft/rigid): 0.8–3.0 mm greyboard, made-to-order
- [Magnetic closures](https://huamei.io/craft/magnetic): 12–18 g pull-force engineering
- [Hot-foil stamping](https://huamei.io/craft/hot-foil): seventeen foil stocks on file
- [Embossing & deboss](https://huamei.io/craft/emboss)
- [Spot-UV](https://huamei.io/craft/spot-uv)
- [Soft-touch lamination](https://huamei.io/craft/soft-touch)

## Industries served
- [Cosmetic & skincare](https://huamei.io/industry/cosmetic)
- [Wine, spirits, tea](https://huamei.io/industry/spirits)
- [Seasonal gifting](https://huamei.io/industry/seasonal)
- [Wellness](https://huamei.io/industry/wellness)

- [Philosophy](https://huamei.io/house/philosophy)
- [Factories](https://huamei.io/house/factory)
